name: Gala Apricot Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats, brown sugar, flour and margarine. Press mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 15 minutes. Cool.
2. Soak gelatin in water; stir over low heat until dissolved. Mix cream cheese and granulated sugar on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended. Gradually add gelatin and brandy to the cream cheese mixture, mixing until well blended.
3. Chill mixture until slightly thickened. Fold in apricots and whipped cream. Pour into crust. Chill until firm.
4. Heat combined preserves and brandy over low heat. Cool. Spoon over cheesecake.
